reason: Renaming files dropped on a target by an optional ${name} template is a functional addition, not a redesign. The UI diff adds one text box and a hint under the existing 'Action on file drop' field in the target editor, and branches the existing copy/move drop path to build per-file destinations (reusing the sorter token engine) and record them for Undo. Wheel geometry, colours, animations and the editor layout are untouched. The rest of the diff is TargetItem, FileOps.ExecuteTo (shell multi-destination mode) and the FileOp/Undo plumbing plus tests. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
